prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is H-201 Duct installation within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.2 Distribution. The observed field condition is: sagging flex (>½ in/ft between supports). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: T3 H-201 Progress assessment
